title: Phase 13: Unit and integration tests for services and API routes
description: Write comprehensive unit tests for all service layers and integration tests for all API routes. Verify audit event emission for every auditable action.
steps: Write unit tests for all service files in src/lib/services/
Cover: user, role, customer, product, order, dispatch, route, truck, pickup, yard, receiving, delivery, collections, credit, crm, estimate, pricing, purchasing, search, report, daily-close services
Write unit tests for all engine files: permissions/evaluate, feature-flags/evaluate, approvals/engine, exceptions/engine
Write integration tests for all API routes
Test auth/RBAC middleware on protected routes
Test pagination, filtering, and error handling on list endpoints
Verify audit events are created for every auditable action
Verify security events are created for auth-related actions
